Off Calendar May-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ANNA PAPAVASILLIOU, and, SOPHIA PAPAVASILLIOU Motion to Transfer Action from San Francisco Superior Court, to Alameda County, State of California, Superior Court. Appearances: Plaintiff Cyporette Qullinan appearing in Pro Per. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to transfer to Alameda County is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/EHG) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489
